title: Function Types, Parameters, Overloads, and Callable APIs · Contract Lens: Overload Design
summary: Refactor status calculations and adapters into callable contracts that preserve inputs, failures, and return relationships. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts overload design increment in a callable service transformation toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write visible overload signatures with one compatible implementation and prefer unions when return relationships do not vary.
Model optional, default, rest, tuple-rest, and destructured parameters without ambiguous call shapes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

// typescript-basics cumulative strict TypeScript portfolio.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Separate compile-time claims from runtime facts, narrow every external unknown with executable evidence, inspect diagnostics and emitted JavaScript, then test a changed schema without assertions or suppression. Apply that move specifically to Overload Design while producing a callable service transformation toolkit.
